# Summary

<!-- What does this PR do? Why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Tested on web (Chrome/Safari)
- [ ] Tested on mobile (responsive / Capacitor) if UI changed
- [ ] Updated docs / README if behavior changed
